response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong Staff-level experience with highly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, perfectly matching the AI-driven engineering environment requirement. He has demonstrated expertise in high-throughput distributed systems and possesses strong TypeScript skills, although his lack of explicit Python experience is a slight gap that his polyglot background mitigates.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Strong software craftsmanship background with extensive TypeScript and Node.js experience.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Python experience, which is listed as a must-have technical skill.
No direct mention of participating in out-of-hours on-call rotations.
Significant portion of backend experience relies on niche languages like DLang rather than the required Python stack.
